headline: T. ROWE PRICE NAMES MIKE BARRY AS HEAD OF GLOBAL MARKETING
summary: T. Rowe Price (NASDAQ: TROW) today announced that Mike Barry has been named head of Global Marketing, effective July 1. Mr. Barry will report to Dee Sawyer, head of Global Distribution.

raw.headline: T. ROWE PRICE NAMES MIKE BARRY AS HEAD OF GLOBAL MARKETING

headline: Edward Jones Expands Workplace Retirement Solutions for Business Owners and Their Employees
summary: Edward Jones today announced a significant expansion of its workplace retirement plan capabilities, adding new product partners and solutions designed to help business owners and their employees improve long-term financial fulfillment.
